# ShipScope

**Open-source AI that analyzes customer feedback and tells you what to build next.**

Cursor made coding 10x faster. ShipScope makes *deciding what to code* 10x smarter.

```
Customer Feedback → AI Synthesis → Feature Proposals → Agent-Ready Specs
```

🔗 [Website](https://shipscope.dev) · [GitHub](https://github.com/shipscope/shipscope) · [Discord](https://discord.gg/shipscope)
